subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from the Point of the Bayán unto Salmán, that he may be illumined by the light of his Lord, the All-Merciful, in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من نقطه البیان الی سلمان لیستضی ء بانوار ربه الرحمن فی تلک الایام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment
